summary: The diff only modifies project_state.json, a metadata/tracking file. No actual implementation changes were made to any frontend source files. Both REQ-1 (Enter key to send, Shift+Enter for newline) and REQ-2 (visible Send button with disabled state and focus return) remain unimplemented.

missing_requirements.requirement: In the ConversationView component, update the message input area so that pressing the Enter key (without Shift) submits and sends the message, while Shift+Enter inserts a newline.
missing_requirements.reason: No changes were made to any frontend component files. The ConversationView component was not modified to add Enter key handling or Shift+Enter newline behavior.

missing_requirements.requirement: In the ConversationView component, ensure a visible Send button is displayed alongside the message input, styled consistently with the Arena neon dark theme, disabled when input is empty, and clears/refocuses input after sending.
missing_requirements.reason: No changes were made to any frontend component files. The ConversationView component was not modified to add a Send button, disable logic, or focus-return behavior.
